articles.title: Lucid将一季度销量下滑归咎于座椅供应商问题
articles.title_original: Lucid blames dip in Q1 sales on seat supplier issue
articles.summary: 美国高端电动汽车制造商Lucid日前表示，公司第一季度销量下滑系座椅供应商问题所致。目前相关供应问题已经得到彻底解决，Lucid同时明确，不会改变此前制定的2026年业绩指引。
articles.summary_original: Lucid said it has resolved the problem and is not changing its guidance for 2026.

articles.title: 伊朗战争实时更新：美军战机被击落及机组人员失踪推高战争风险
articles.title_original: Iran War Live Updates: Downed U.S. Jet and Missing Crew Member Raise Stakes in War
articles.summary: 这场持续五周的伊朗战争中，一架美军F-15E战机被伊朗击落，这是战事开启以来首架被伊朗击落的美军战机，目前有一名机组人员失踪。另据美国官员透露，另有一架美军战机在海湾地区坠毁，机上飞行员已获救，相关事件推高了战争升级风险。
articles.summary_original: The F-15E was the first American warplane shot down by Iran in the five-week war and a crew member is missing. A second U.S. combat plane crashed in the Gulf region and its pilot was rescued, U.S. officials said.

articles.title: 小长假里看中国｜从一朵花，看见春日经济的活力 - 新华网
articles.summary: 春日小长假期间，多家主流媒体聚焦我国春日经济发展动态，关注各地依托赏花培育出的“花样经济”新业态。这种从“种田地”向“种风景”的转型，既展现出春日消费市场的强劲活力，赋能乡村振兴，也引发对赏花经济如何实现长效发展的探讨。

articles.title: 树立和践行正确政绩观学习教育中央第八指导组指导督导南开大学见面会召开 - 南开大学新闻
articles.summary: 当前，多地及相关高校正开展树立和践行正确政绩观学习教育，中央已派出指导组进驻开展指导督导，其中中央第一指导组进驻江西，中央第八指导组督导南开大学，部分地方干部下沉一线督导，权威媒体也刊发相关评论，推动学习教育扎实开展。

articles.title: 陕西积厚成势迈向文化强省（“十五五”开好局起好步） - cpc.people.com.cn
articles.summary: “十五五”开好局起好步主题下的相关报道，核心聚焦陕西文化建设发展，指出当地依托既有文化积累厚植发展优势，正积厚成势推进文化强省建设，相关内容刊发于人民网，完整报道可在Google新闻查看。

articles.title: 美军一天之内两架战机被击落 两架直升机被击中 - 新华网
articles.summary: 一天之内，伊朗击落美军两架战机、击中两架直升机，被击落战机包括美军A-10攻击机与F-35战斗机，伊朗公布了击中A-10攻击机的现场画面，并公开嘲讽美以，美国总统特朗普回应称该事件不会影响美伊谈判。

articles.title: 中国瞄准月球 美国宇航局密切关注
articles.title_original: China’s Aiming for the Moon, and NASA Is Looking Over Its Shoulder
articles.summary: 美国航天局于周三发射开展月球飞越任务，中国正以高度专注的姿态推进自主探月航天项目，目前已有相关内容整理推出，通过图文、视频形式向公众介绍中国探月项目的相关信息。
articles.summary_original: The U.S. space agency launched a lunar flyby Wednesday, but Beijing is pursuing its own space program with formidable focus. Here’s what we know about it, in photos and videos.

articles.title: Anthropic要求订阅用户额外付费 实质上禁止OpenClaw接入Claude
articles.title_original: Anthropic essentially bans OpenClaw from Claude by making subscribers pay extra

articles.summary_original: Using OpenClaw with Claude AI is about to get a lot more expensive, thanks to Anthropic's new policy changes. Beginning April 4th at 3PM ET, users will "no longer be able to use your Claude subscription limits for third-party harnesses including OpenClaw," according to an email sent to users on Friday evening. articles.title: 执政16年后，欧尔班·维克托能否最终下台？
articles.title_original: After 16 years in power, can Viktor Orban finally be unseated?
articles.summary: 匈牙利将于九天后举行议会选举，现任领导人欧尔班·维克托已连续掌权16年，此次选举最受外界关注的核心悬念在于，长期执政的欧尔班是否会被对手击败，最终失去执政地位。
articles.summary_original: Hungary is going to the polls in nine days - after 16 years in power, can Viktor Orban be unseated?

articles.title: 自认能在沙特阿拉伯成功运营的匿名社交应用
articles.title_original: The anonymous social app that thinks it can work in Saudi Arabia
articles.summary: 匿名社交应用Fizz已悄悄进入沙特阿拉伯市场推出服务，其创始人兼首席执行官泰迪·所罗门表示，他最初并未预料到这款应用能够在当地获得如此高的受欢迎度，产品走红完全超出了他此前的预期。
articles.summary_original: When Fizz quietly debuted in Saudi Arabia, founder and CEO Teddy Solomon wasn’t expecting the app to catch on like it did.

articles.title: 阿尔忒弥斯二号机组拍下绝美地球照片
articles.title_original: Artemis II crew take 'spectacular' image of Earth
articles.summary: 阿尔忒弥斯二号任务机组正前往月球，这张堪称惊艳的地球照片，由任务指挥官里德·怀斯曼在搭乘的猎户座太空舱内拍摄，记录下了本次探月行程中太空视角下的地球影像。
articles.summary_original: The snap was taken aboard the Orion capsule by its commander, Reid Wiseman, as the crew head towards the Moon.

articles.title: 美国施压加剧，古巴开始释放超2000名囚犯
articles.title_original: Cuba begins releasing more than 2,000 prisoners as US pressure mounts
articles.summary: 美国总统特朗普明确表示希望改变古巴领导层，对古巴实施石油禁运，对古巴施压力度持续升级。在美国压力不断攀升的背景下，古巴已启动相关进程，开始释放超过两千名囚犯。
articles.summary_original: US President Trump has made clear his desire to change Cuba's leadership and has placed the country under an oil embargo.

articles.title: NASA最终解决阿尔忒弥斯二号的Outlook故障
articles.title_original: NASA did eventually solve Artemis II’s Outlook glitch
articles.summary: 周四，阿尔忒弥斯二号探月任务飞行途中，指令长里德·威斯曼遭遇了一个地球用户也常碰到的技术问题：微软Outlook软件无法正常工作。该对话被NASA阿尔忒弥斯任务直播记录，后续分享至社交平台Bluesky，最终NASA成功排除了这一故障。
articles.summary_original: On Thursday, during Artemis II's journey to the Moon, commander Reid Wiseman ran into a tech issue some of us back on Earth can relate to: Microsoft Outlook wasn't working. In a conversation captured in NASA's Artemis livestream and shared on Bluesky, Wiseman reported to Mission Control: "I also see that I have two Microsoft […]

articles.title: 据报道特斯拉德州工厂2025年员工规模缩减22%
articles.title_original: Tesla’s Texas factory workforce reportedly shrunk 22% in 2025
articles.summary: 有报告显示，2025年特斯拉美国德州工厂员工数量从21191人缩减至16506人，整体规模缩减22%。目前特斯拉正面临连续第二年销量下滑的困境，此次人员调整是公司应对销量持续下滑的相关举措。
articles.summary_original: Tesla's headcount fell from 21,191 workers to 16,506 workers in 2025, according to a report, as it grappled with its second straight year of declining sales.

articles.title: 美军精英部队如何执行战斗救援任务
articles.title_original: How elite US teams tackle combat rescue missions
articles.summary: 美国空军的伞降救援单位专精战斗搜索与救援（CSAR）任务，是美国军队中训练水平最高的作战力量之一，相关内容聚焦这批美军顶尖精英单位，介绍其执行战斗救援任务的具体开展方式。
articles.summary_original: Air force pararescue units who specialise in CSAR missions are among the most highly trained in the US military.

articles.title: OpenAI高管人事变动：首席运营官布拉德·莱特卡普将出任新职领导“特殊项目”
articles.title_original: OpenAI executive shuffle includes new role for COO Brad Lightcap to lead ‘special projects’
articles.summary: OpenAI调整高管团队，首席运营官布拉德·莱特卡普将获得新职位，牵头负责公司“特殊项目”。此外，公司首席营销官凯特·劳奇将暂时离任，专心进行癌症康复治疗，计划待身体条件允许后重返岗位。
articles.summary_original: In addition to Lightcap's new role, OpenAI CMO Kate Rouch will be stepping away from the company to focus on cancer recovery, with a plan to return when her health allows.

articles.title: OpenAI高管人事调整：首席运营官布拉德·莱特卡普将牵头“特殊项目”
articles.title_original: OpenAI executive shuffle includes new role for COO Brad Lightcap to lead ‘special projects’
articles.summary: OpenAI进行高管人事调整，首席运营官布拉德·莱特卡普将转任新职位，牵头负责公司“特殊项目”。此外，公司首席营销官凯特·劳奇将离职，专心进行癌症康复，计划待健康条件允许后回归公司。
articles.summary_original: In addition to Lightcap's new role, OpenAI CMO Kate Rouch will be stepping away from the company to focus on cancer recovery, with a plan to return when her health allows.

articles.title: OpenClaw引发用户新一轮网络安全恐慌
articles.title_original: OpenClaw gives users yet another reason to be freaked out about security
articles.summary: 近期走红网络的AI智能工具OpenClaw被曝出存在高危安全漏洞，攻击者可利用该漏洞，在无需身份认证的情况下悄无声息获取目标系统管理员权限，这一安全隐患的曝光，也引发了广大用户对网络安全的新一轮恐慌。
articles.summary_original: The viral AI agentic tool let attackers silently gain admin unauthenticated access.

articles.title: 据报道Anthropic以4亿美元收购生物科技初创公司Coefficient Bio
articles.title_original: Anthropic buys biotech startup Coefficient Bio in $400M deal: Reports
articles.summary: 据《The Information》及埃里克·纽科姆消息，人工智能公司Anthropic达成一笔价值4亿美元的股票交易，收购处于未公开运营状态的AI生物科技初创公司Coefficient Bio，是人工智能企业跨界布局生物科技领域的大额交易。
articles.summary_original: Anthropic has purchased the stealth biotech AI startup Coefficient Bio in a $400 million stock deal, according to The Information and Eric Newcomer.

articles.title: Anthropic成立新政治行动委员会扩大政治活动
articles.title_original: Anthropic ramps up its political activities with a new PAC
articles.summary: 美国中期选举即将到来，AI企业Anthropic成立全新政治行动委员会，扩大自身政治活动布局。该机构将支持认同这家AI公司政策议程的参选候选人，助力其相关政策主张获得政治层面的支持。
articles.summary_original: With the midterms right around the corner, the new group is positioned to back candidates who support the AI company's policy agenda.

articles.title: 安思罗普成立新政治行动委员会扩大政治活动
articles.title_original: Anthropic ramps up its political activities with a new PAC
articles.summary: 美国中期选举即将临近，人工智能企业安思罗普宣布成立全新的政治行动委员会，该机构将为支持这家AI公司政策议程的竞选候选人提供支持，是该公司扩大自身政治活动布局的重要动作。
articles.summary_original: With the midterms right around the corner, the new group is positioned to back candidates who support the AI company's policy agenda.

articles.title: 提升效率、便捷生活的最佳iPad应用

articles.summary: 当前有大量适配iPad的应用，可帮助用户整理食谱、跨设备同步任务、管理笔记，满足多种日常与工作需求，能够有效助力用户提升生产效率，简化各项事务流程，为用户的生活与工作提供便利。
articles.summary_original: There are many iPad apps to help you organize recipes, sync tasks across devices, be more productive, and manage your notes.

articles.title: AI企业兴建大型天然气厂为数据中心供电，可能出什么问题？
articles.title_original: AI companies are building huge natural gas plants to power data centers. What could go wrong?
articles.summary: Meta、微软、谷歌三家头部科技企业目前纷纷大手笔押注，新建天然气发电厂来为自家扩张中的AI数据中心提供能源支撑，这一能源布局暗藏风险，该决策未来很可能会让这些企业追悔莫及。
articles.summary_original: Meta, Microsoft, and Google are all betting big on new natural gas power plants to run their AI data centers. They may regret it.

articles.title: 人工智能企业建造大型天然气厂为数据中心供电，这会出什么问题？
articles.title_original: AI companies are building huge natural gas plants to power data centers. What could go wrong?

articles.summary_original: Meta, Microsoft, and Google are all betting big on new natural gas power plants to run their AI data centers. They may regret it.

articles.title: 民众宁愿自家后院建亚马逊仓库，也不愿建数据中心
articles.title_original: People would rather have an Amazon warehouse in their backyard than a data center
articles.summary: 一项最新民意调查结果显示，公众对数据中心的接受度远低于亚马逊仓储设施，多数人更倾向于在居住周边建亚马逊仓库而非数据中心，目前围绕数据中心落地的相关争议远未平息。
articles.summary_original: A new poll shows that the debate over data centers is far from settled.

articles.title_original: People would rather have an Amazon warehouse in their backyard than a data center

articles.title: 内存危机冲击游戏硬件 联想拯救者Go 2突涨650美元
articles.title_original: Lenovo Legion Go 2 suddenly costs $650 more as RAMageddon lays waste to gaming hardware

articles.summary_original: Remember when we thought the Legion Go 2 was expensive at $1,099 and up? Those were the days - Best Buy is now listing Lenovo's handheld for $1,499 with a Ryzen Z2 or $1,999 with a Z2 Extreme. The latter originally cost $1,349, so that's a $650 jump in just six months. And yes, that […]

articles.title: 美国法官驳回皮罗恢复已撤销美联储传票的动议
articles.title_original: US Judge Denies Pirro Motion to Revive Quashed Fed Subpoenas
articles.summary: 美国司法部针对美联储大楼翻修成本超支问题展开调查，其试图继续推进调查的诉求已告失败。此次裁定为该案的上诉程序铺平道路，本案最终可能会上诉至美国最高法院。
articles.summary_original: The Justice Department lost its bid to continue an investigation into building-renovation cost overruns by the Federal Reserve, setting the stage for an appeal that could eventually reach the Supreme Court.

articles.title: 里马·哈桑因社交媒体发帖宣扬恐怖主义被起诉
articles.title_original: Rima Hassan Is Charged With Glorifying Terrorism Online in Social Media Post
articles.summary: 欧洲议会议员里马·哈桑被指控犯有宣扬恐怖主义罪，因其在社交媒体发布的帖文中，引用了1972年发生在以色列的一起屠杀事件施暴者的相关言论，此次指控若成立，她最高可能面临七年监禁。
articles.summary_original: Rima Hassan, a member of the European Parliament, could face seven years in prison for the post, in which she quoted a perpetrator of a 1972 massacre in Israel.

articles.title: 国际化大都市上海难以契合中国的西方罪恶叙事
articles.title_original: Cosmopolitan Shanghai Is an Uneasy Fit in China’s Narrative of Western Sins
articles.summary: 上海拥有层次丰富的建筑、文化与政治生态，其多元开放的鲜明国际化特质，令其难以契合中方当下所推崇的、关于中国近代遭西方侵略的受害者叙事，以及批判西方罪恶的既定话语框架。
articles.summary_original: Shanghai’s many layers of architecture, culture and politics have made it a difficult fit for the Communist Party’s preferred narrative of Chinese victimhood and Western sins.

articles.title: 古巴是否会爆发民众起义？
articles.title_original: Could There Be a Popular Uprising in Cuba?
articles.summary: 当前古巴国内并无成型的有组织反对派，诸多对现政权持批评态度的异见人士已逃离该国。不过古巴境内反政府抗议活动的规模正在持续增长，这一动向也引发外界对古巴局势走向的关注与讨论。
articles.summary_original: There is no organized opposition on the island because many critics of the regime have fled. But anti-government protests have been growing.

articles.title: 法国企业所属船只通过霍尔木兹海峡
articles.title_original: French-owned ship passes through Strait of Hormuz
articles.summary: 霍尔木兹海峡区域冲突爆发后，一艘法国企业所有的船只近日完成了该海峡的通行。据信这是冲突开始以来，首艘由欧洲主要企业拥有的船只通过这一全球重要的能源运输战略航道，引发国际航运领域关注。
articles.summary_original: It appears to be the first ship owned by a major European firm to go through the strait since the conflict began.

articles.title: 当下可享的最优iPad优惠

articles.summary_original: While the best iPad deals usually land during major sale events like Black Friday, many great iPad deals are available outside of those moments. The day-to-day discounts come and go like the changing winds, so there’s often some amount to be saved somewhere, particularly on Apple’s most affordable iPad and the latest iPad Mini. Hell, you […]

articles.title: 在太空部署数据中心所需的四大条件
articles.title_original: Four things we’d need to put data centers in space
articles.summary: 《麻省理工科技评论》推出专栏梳理复杂科技领域，帮助读者预判未来技术走向。今年1月，埃隆·马斯克旗下SpaceX向美国联邦通信委员会提交申请，计划在地球轨道部署多达一百万个数据中心。
articles.summary_original: MIT Technology Review Explains: Let our writers untangle the complex, messy world of technology to help you understand what’s coming next. You can read more from the series here. In January, Elon Musk’s SpaceX filed an application with the US Federal Communications Commission to launch up to one million data centers into Earth’s orbit. The…

articles.title: 检方称说唱歌手Gucci Mane遭同行绑架抢劫
articles.title_original: Rapper Gucci Mane kidnapped and robbed by fellow artist, prosecutors say
articles.summary: 检方通报，知名说唱明星Gucci Mane遭同行绑架抢劫，作案人员强迫他签署文件，解除另一名说唱歌手Pooh Shiesty在其名下的唱片合约，目前相关官方部门已介入该案，正在核查涉案人员的相关违法行为。
articles.summary_original: Officials say the hip-hop star was forced to sign papers releasing a rapper known as Pooh Shiesty from his record contract.

articles.title: 特斯拉Model X、S即将停产 全线押注Cybercab
articles.title_original: The final days of the Tesla Model X and S are here. All bets are on the Cybercab.
articles.summary: 特斯拉已进入全新发展阶段，旗下Model X与Model S产品线即将停产收官。未来特斯拉将把发展重心全面转向新赛道，新阶段发展的核心，依赖于其成功推出Cybercab、实现Optimus人形机器人大规模量产的能力。
articles.summary_original: It's a new era for Tesla — and one that will rely on its ability to launch the Cybercab and mass-produce the Optimus robot.

articles.title: 2026年4月3日《彭博观察》
articles.title_original: Bloomberg Surveillance 4/3/2026
articles.summary: 由乔纳森·费罗、丽莎·阿布拉莫维奇与安玛莉·霍登主持，每日邀请华尔街、华盛顿及其他地区的领袖和决策者开展对话。相较于其他同类节目，它更能帮助投资者与企业高管为交易日做好准备，信息来源为彭博。
articles.summary_original: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern speak daily with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. No other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: 美国将8名“非洲裔”人士遣返乌干达
articles.title_original: US deports eight people 'of African origin' to Uganda
articles.summary: 美国将8名标注为“非洲裔”的人士遣送至乌干达，乌干达律师协会公开对此次遣返行动提出批评，明确指出本次遣返本身属于非法行为，相关处置方式不尊重当事人人权，属于不人道的操作。
articles.summary_original: The Uganda Law Society criticises the deportation, saying it was illegal and "dehumanising".

articles.title: 特朗普寻求1.5万亿美元国防拨款 同时削减国内开支
articles.title_original: Trump seeks $1.5tn for defence alongside domestic spending cuts
articles.summary: 美国总统特朗普提出新预算方案，计划将非国防领域开支削减10%，减支目标将部分通过砍削多项国内公共项目实现，以此筹措总额1.5万亿美元的国防拨款。
articles.summary_original: The US president's new budget would cut non-defence spending by 10%, partly by slashing domestic programmes.

articles.title: 奔驰为EQS新增线控转向与轭式方向盘
articles.title_original: Mercedes adds steer-by-wire — and a dang steering yoke — to the EQS
articles.summary: 线控转向是一种无需在方向盘与转向机之间建立物理连接，依靠电子信号实现转向的技术。德国汽车制造商奔驰将在即将推出的改款EQS轿车上应用该技术，这也是奔驰首次涉足线控转向领域。
articles.summary_original: Steer-by-wire, in which a car can be steered electronically rather than through a physical connection between the steering wheel and steering rack, is coming to Mercedes-Benz. The German automaker says it will use the steering technology in its forthcoming refreshed EQS sedan, marking its first foray into the world of steer-by-wire. Steer-by-wire systems replace traditional […]

articles.title: 安克五口小型旅行适配器降至历史最低价
articles.title_original: Anker’s small, five-port travel adapter is down to its best price yet
articles.summary: 不少人春季出国度假时，常会遇上忘记携带充电设备的麻烦。安克推出的Nano旅行适配器，可方便用户在旅途任何地点为手机、相机、电纸书等多类设备充电，目前该产品直降6美元，以19.99美元的历史最低价开售。

articles.title_original: I saved a doomed Windows laptop by embracing Linux
articles.summary: 两周前，作者翻出一台使用九年的ThinkPad笔记本，它属于全球约2亿至4亿台不符合微软Windows 11升级要求的Windows 10设备，微软10月正式停止Windows 10支持后，这台笔记本已沦为淘汰产品，作者尝试改用Linux系统拯救它。
articles.summary_original: Two weeks ago I set aside my M4 MacBook Air and picked up a nine-year-old ThinkPad. It's one of an estimated 200 to 400 million Windows 10 PCs that don't meet Microsoft's requirements for Windows 11. When Microsoft officially ended support for Windows 10 in October, it became "obsolete." The solution, according to Microsoft, is […]

articles.title: 阿联酋环球铝业称阿布扎比铝产能恢复或需一年
articles.title_original: It May Take a Year to Restore Abu Dhabi Aluminum Output, EGA Says
articles.summary: 中东地区最大铝生产商阿联酋环球铝业（EGA）对外表示，一周前其位于阿布扎比的工厂遭遇伊朗袭击，受该袭击事件影响，要恢复工厂全部生产产能，最长可能需要一年时间。
articles.summary_original: The Middle East’s biggest aluminum producer said it may take as long as a year to restore full output at its Abu Dhabi plant, following an Iranian attack a week ago.

articles.title: 经济学家斯洛克预计美国经济将呈“耐克勾型”复苏
articles.title_original: Economist Slok Sees ‘Nike Swoosh’ Recovery for US
articles.summary: 阿波罗公司首席经济学家托斯顿·斯洛克判断，美国经济将呈现“耐克勾型”复苏。他指出，即便受到伊朗战事的冲击，仍有三大核心因素能够支撑美国经济保持增长，相关分析内容来源为彭博社。
articles.summary_original: Torsten Slok, chief economist at Apollo, explains the three factors he sees supporting US economic growth despite the impact of the war in Iran. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: 美国3月新增17.8万个就业岗位 失业率降至4.3%
articles.title_original: US Adds 178,000 Jobs in March, Unemployment Rate Falls to 4.3%
articles.summary: 美国劳工统计局周五公布的数据显示，该国3月新增非农就业岗位17.8万个，新增就业人数超出市场预期，失业率降至4.3%。相关内容由迈克尔·麦基在彭博电视台报道，消息来源为彭博社。
articles.summary_original: US hiring beat forecasts in March as nonfarm payrolls increased 178,000 and the jobless rate declined to 4.3%, according to Bureau of Labor Statistics data out Friday. Michael McKee reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: 孩子放假大人上班 春假难点如何破？ - 新京报
articles.summary: 近期，多地中小学生开启春假模式，春假最长连休可达8天。不少地方精心谋划，推出了丰富多彩的春假安排，给学生送上专属春天“礼包”。但春假也暴露出孩子放假大人仍正常上班的照料难题，引发对如何让春假放得好的讨论。

articles.title: 中国人民抗日战争纪念馆启动“清明节的铭记”主题教育系列活动 - 中国日报网
articles.summary: 清明之际，中国人民抗日战争纪念馆启动“清明节的铭记”主题教育系列活动，全国各地也纷纷开展各类主题纪念活动，福建少先队员以站班岗、诗歌朗诵致敬八闽英魂，各地民众以多种形式追思缅怀革命先烈，在传承中汲取奋进力量。

articles.title: 打造AI时代内容审核体系的Facebook内部人士
articles.title_original: The Facebook insider building content moderation for the AI era
articles.summary: 由Facebook内部人士创办的创业公司Moonbounce已成功筹得1200万美元融资，这笔资金将用于拓展其AI管控引擎，该引擎可将内容审核政策转化为一致、可预测的AI行为，打造适配AI时代的内容审核体系。
articles.summary_original: Moonbounce has raised $12 million to grow its AI control engine that converts content moderation policies into consistent, predictable AI behavior.

articles.title: 等待特朗普手机

articles.title: 美国国家经济委员会哈塞特谈就业报告、石油出口与美国经济
articles.title_original: NEC’s Hassett on Jobs Report, Oil Exports, US Economy
articles.summary: 美国国家经济委员会主任凯文·哈塞特对美国3月就业报告作出回应，同时围绕相关经济议题展开讨论，谈及伊朗战事引发的石油市场供应中断问题，以及油价波动可能对美国经济造成的潜在影响，相关消息来自彭博社。
articles.summary_original: National Economic Council Director Kevin Hassett reacts to the US March jobs report and discusses oil market supply disruptions related to the war in Iran and the potential impact of oil prices on the US economy. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: 清明节的铭记！97岁抗战老战士向英烈献花 - 京报网
articles.summary: 清明节来临之际，京报网推出以“清明节的铭记”为主题的新闻报道，内容记录一名97岁高龄的抗战老战士，在清明纪念活动中向为民族解放事业牺牲的革命英烈敬献鲜花，这则报道的完整内容可在Google新闻平台查看。

articles.title: 特朗普电视讲话 背后有何深意？ - 中国日报网
articles.summary: 多国媒体及机构聚焦特朗普的黄金时段电视讲话，该讲话针对美国“史诗狂怒”行动发布，特朗普称美国正处在终结伊朗邪恶威胁的关头。各方围绕此次讲话解读背后意图，指出特朗普真正的难题才刚显现，有观点认为其气质契合美式霸权续命的需求。

articles.title: 苹果有史以来最佳产品

articles.title: 就业数据强劲削弱美联储降息预期 美债下跌
articles.title_original: US Bonds Fall as Strong Jobs Data Undermines Fed Cut Outlook
articles.summary: 美国劳动力市场显现企稳迹象，中东战事对经济的影响仍存在不确定性，本周交易收官之际，债券交易员普遍预判美联储今年将维持利率不变，受相关预期影响美债价格走低。
articles.summary_original: Bond traders ended the week betting that the Federal Reserve will keep interest rates steady this year, on signs of a stabilizing US labor market and uncertainty about the economic impact of war in the Middle East.

articles.title: 法国法院推翻禁止穆斯林集会的禁令
articles.title_original: France's Muslim gathering ban overturned by courts
articles.summary: 巴黎警方此前称，一场为期四天的穆斯林集会可能成为恐怖主义袭击目标，构成安全威胁，因此对该集会下达禁令。日前法国法院作出裁决，推翻了巴黎警方这一禁止集会的决定。
articles.summary_original: The Paris police department had argued that the four-day gathering was a security threat because it could be a target of terrorism.
